textByHash.79208e7258996ddfc28bc09c5fc2c715b98d4702: Hello, and welcome to the Crafting Guild. Accomplished crafters from all over the land come here to use our top notch workshops.
textByHash.c3770d97364e366d24aece0fe1de143cc5ea3953: Bone seeds? What are bone seeds?
textByHash.a6770d3019f7f47e50c27a32500d179910c77746: Woah dude! That's, like, some seriously maximum stuff you're talking.
textByHash.c0129f422b6ab5792099034d5d442b2d05407151: Yeah, you just need a pot with a lid. Do you know how to make pot lids?
textByHash.0720bf0832f2115af772f4e3031eef3d7cccc28a: Tassie Slipcast? She's one groovy lady.
textByHash.df1d3044be19344abbe6d3f758f935e6d3ae4ef0: Yeah, yeah. You need to chill out more, dude.
textByHash.d5f52a79ff6925fed614aa9c10b44baf6659d945: A pot with a lid. Nothing more, nothing less.
textByHash.8abf2564a657dd0c5ec99e1e1701c7d406d8c00e: This? This is a Skillcape of Crafting. It is a symbol of my ability as master of the Crafting Guild and it provides unlimited teleports here.
textByHash.77ac3e7f7e4ec2893b6b9f94ae44a00655c032a2: If you should ever achieve level 99 Crafting come and talk to me and we'll see if we can sort you out with one.
textByHash.5d35a2eb29e7b784bd08ff6e2e325da6007d8788: I certainly am, and I can see that you are definitely talented enough to own one! The cape has a built-in teleport back to us at the guild too!
textByHash.07a479982ab8b357ec224cefdad98cc1cdadc5d1: Unfortunately, being such a prestigious item, they are appropriately expensive. I'm afraid I must ask you for 99000 gold.
textByHash.2750dd3b06c14d3efbdadeacceeecc0df3e370c6: Not at all; there are many other adventurers who would love the opportunity to purchase such a prestigious item! You can find me here if you change your mind.
textByHash.51fa37d1170bc1f1df9b1be904847b619638c195: Well, come back and see me when you do.
textByHash.58f1fdd904d724b985799470ba396e43535885d8: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood, it's part of a skill promotion deal; buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.
textByHash.b6c0420f5c5fa4d315ad8d2fb05245550678b65f: Excellent! Wear that cape with pride my friend.
textByHash.feb1b32de4c421fc949a6038c64e2a0dcdbdd4a3: Most certainly, and free of charge!
textByHash.0f27c72806911006a3d38d91c03ee7636f8c5c51: Where's your brown apron? You can't come in here unless you're wearing one.
textByHash.ad44e8d157173e69681955feeca8e5e4e7708b26: Welcome to the Guild of Master Craftsmen.
textByHash.71eae2c72068157692b13ccc578cecaa4471d3bb: Dude, do I look like I wanna talk to you?
